title: Use Summary Counts To Check Active And Charging Robots
summary: Use the map monitor summary area to identify the displayed count of robots actively running in the system and the displayed count of robots actively charging.
when_to_use: Use this reference when you need to read the map monitor summary metrics for active robot count and charging robot count.
not_for: Do not use these counts alone to infer performance conditions.
Do not use these counts alone to infer fault conditions.
Do not use this procedure as a corrective action; the source supports reading the counts, not acting on them.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Read the map monitor summary area and identify the displayed active and charging robot counts.

safety_notes: This source supports viewing summary metrics only.
Escalate if the displayed counts appear inconsistent with the visible system state and the source provides no further explanation.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the map monitor summary area

access_required: Access to the map monitor summary area
system_preconditions: The map monitor summary area is visible.

visual_references.description: Map monitor summary area showing summary indicators including active robot count and charging robot count.

steps.title: Locate the active robot count
steps.purpose: Identify where the active robot metric is displayed in the map monitor summary area.
steps.instruction: Open or view the map monitor summary area and locate the active robot count indicator.
steps.expected_result: The active robot count field is visible in the summary area.
steps.healthy_condition: A distinct active robot count is displayed in the map monitor summary area.
steps.failure_condition: The active robot count cannot be located or is not visible in the summary area.

actions.label: Find active robot count
actions.exact_action: Locate the active robot count in the map monitor summary area.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The map monitor summary area where the active robot count is shown.

stop_or_escalate_if: The active robot count is not visible.
The displayed summary area does not match the referenced map monitor view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The second point, it's the active robot count... telling you how many robots you have that are actively running in the system...

steps.title: Read the active robot count
steps.purpose: Determine how many robots are actively running in the system.
steps.instruction: Read the displayed active robot count and interpret it as the number of robots actively running in the system.
steps.expected_result: You know the current number of robots actively running.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed count can be read clearly and corresponds to the active robot metric.
steps.failure_condition: The count is unreadable, ambiguous, or appears inconsistent with the visible system state.

actions.label: Read active robot count
actions.exact_action: Read the active robot count to determine how many robots are actively running in the system.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The active robot count value in the map monitor summary area.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed count appears inconsistent with the visible system state and no explanation is available in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The second point, it's the active robot count... telling you how many robots you have that are actively running in the system...
Map monitor summary metrics include active robot count for robots actively running...

steps.title: Locate the charging robot count
steps.purpose: Identify where the charging robot metric is displayed in the same summary area.
steps.instruction: In the same map monitor summary area, locate the charging robot count indicator.
steps.expected_result: The charging robot count field is visible in the summary area.
steps.healthy_condition: A distinct charging robot count is displayed in the map monitor summary area.
steps.failure_condition: The charging robot count cannot be located or is not visible in the summary area.

actions.label: Find charging robot count
actions.exact_action: Locate the charging robot count in the same summary area.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The map monitor summary area where the charging robot count is shown.

stop_or_escalate_if: The charging robot count is not visible.
The displayed summary area does not match the referenced map monitor view.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: Training slide and narration describing the map monitor summary indicators for messages, active robots, charging robots, AGV faults, disconnected AGVs, fault inspection, and system E-stop.

steps.title: Read the charging robot count
steps.purpose: Determine how many robots are actively charging at the moment.
steps.instruction: Read the displayed charging robot count and interpret it as the number of robots actively charging at that moment.
steps.expected_result: You know the current number of robots actively charging.
steps.healthy_condition: The displayed count can be read clearly and corresponds to the charging robot metric.
steps.failure_condition: The count is unreadable, ambiguous, or appears inconsistent with the visible system state.

actions.label: Read charging robot count
actions.exact_action: Read the charging count to determine how many robots are actively charging at the moment.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The charging robot count value in the map monitor summary area.

stop_or_escalate_if: The displayed count appears inconsistent with the visible system state and no explanation is available in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: it says 10, which means that you have 10 robots in the system that are actively charging at the moment.
Map monitor summary metrics include ... a charging robot count for robots actively charging.

steps.title: Record the displayed counts
steps.purpose: Capture the currently displayed active and charging robot counts for reference.
steps.instruction: Record the displayed active robot count and charging robot count.
steps.expected_result: The current active and charging robot counts are documented.
steps.healthy_condition: Both displayed counts are captured exactly as shown.
steps.failure_condition: One or both counts are not recorded or cannot be read reliably.

actions.label: Record counts
actions.exact_action: Record the displayed active and charging robot counts.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The active and charging robot count values to be recorded.

stop_or_escalate_if: One or both displayed counts appear inconsistent with the visible system state and the source provides no further explanation.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The training identifies summary metrics for active robot count and robots currently charging in the system.

success_criteria: The active robot count is identified from the map monitor summary area.
The charging robot count is identified from the map monitor summary area.
The displayed active and charging counts are recorded.
healthy_conditions: The map monitor summary area is visible.
The active robot count is readable.
The charging robot count is readable.
failure_conditions: The active robot count cannot be located or read.
The charging robot count cannot be located or read.
The displayed counts appear inconsistent with the visible system state and the source provides no explanation.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the displayed counts appear inconsistent with the visible system state and the source provides no further explanation.
Do not infer performance or fault conditions from the counts alone unless supported elsewhere.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Map monitor summary area showing active robot count and charging robot count.

source_refs.quote_or_summary: The second point, it's the active robot count... telling you how many robots you have that are actively running in the system... it says 10, which means that you have 10 robots in the system that are actively charging at the moment.

missing_details: The source does not provide a precise UI navigation path to the map monitor summary area.
The source does not define a required recording destination or format for the counts.
The source does not provide thresholds or interpretation rules beyond identifying active and charging counts.
